subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! On this day every leaf maketh mention of His remembrance, and the leaves of the Divine Lote-Tree speak forth "The Truth hath come." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و ورقتی امروز هر ورقی بذکری ذاکر و اوراق سدره منتهی بقد اتی الحق ناطق
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
